episodes.title: Did the Epstein Fallout Cost Pam Bondi Her Job?
episodes.description:
President Donald Trump has removed former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi from her role as the nation’s top law enforcement officer, marking a major shakeup inside the administration.

While both sides are publicly framing the move as “amicable,” sources say Trump grew frustrated with how Bondi handled key priorities — including high-profile investigations and political cases. Her handling of the Epstein files controversy and a widely criticized Capitol Hill appearance reportedly played a role in the decision.

Bondi says she’s heading into the private sector, with speculation swirling about a possible future role — even a potential judicial appointment. In the meantime, Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche will step in as acting AG while Trump searches for a permanent replacement. One name already being floated: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin.

This marks the second major cabinet-level exit in recent weeks, raising questions about stability inside Trump’s team and what could come next.

👉 What do YOU think — justified move or political shakeup? Let us know in the comments.
